design_philosophy.core_loop: Select team, play hockey match with real NHL teams and players, manage puck possession and scoring
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Real-time competitive play against opponent AI or human player; balancing offensive and defensive positioning
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Simulate professional NHL hockey gameplay with authentic teams, rosters, and competitive match outcomes
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Early sports sim emphasizing arcade-style hockey action over deep statistical simulation; rapid pacing and accessible controls prioritized over management depth

difficulty.continues_system: Standard match structure; losses reset to main menu
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: AI opponent difficulty likely adjustable; single vs. multi-game season structure provides variable engagement length

progression.unlock_mechanism: Team selection from NHL roster; potential unlockable teams or season modes
replayability_hooks: Multiple NHL teams with distinct rosters to select
Season mode structure encouraging multiple matches
Varying AI difficulty for different opponent challenges

world_building_techniques: Authentic NHL team branding and roster representation
Real player names and team identities grounding experience in actual sports context

faction_indicators: NHL team selection creates sports allegiance expression
Home vs. away team designation signals competitive stakes
environmental_storytelling: Team logos and arena aesthetics reinforce authentic NHL presentation
Scoreboard and match statistics communicate competitive narrative
